name: Honga
label: 前端開發熱愛者
selfDescription:
I am a software developer with a passion for web development, with experience building modern interfaces using the React ecosystem.

I enjoy creating small tools based on web technologies, as well as developing desktop applications. I often use Electron, Pywebview, and Tauri to build cross-platform desktop apps.

projects.description: A highly customizable and mobild first Template for personal portfolio and blog
A modern AI chat interface featuring real-time streaming responses and a responsive design, built for the Akashic AI ecosystem.
A data collection platform for building low-code dynamic forms, powered by AI-driven form filling and human validation.
A tool that makes it easy to generate and use Material You color palettes as design tokens.
Wordout turns your collected words into daily workouts. Build your vocabulary, one session at a time.

experiments.description: A tiny CLI tool for asking AI questions directly from the terminal.
A lightweight project for displaying 3D assets on the web.
A platform that allows users to create and manage their own financial input and output with AI agents. (Partial View due to confidentiality)
Practice typing and pronunciation of the Russian alphabet

details.detail: It allows you to convert these palettes into CSS variables, so they can be seamlessly integrated into your web development color system.
